item.description: An honest look at the struggles many men silently endure but rarely talk about openly.

item.title: All because he got the “wrong” flowers…

item.title: The Utter Disrespect Women Show Men

item.title: Would you marry a woman that’s divorced three times??
item.description: An open debate about whether someone’s past multiple marriages should influence the decision to commit.

item.title: Men have left the friendzone and women don’t know what to do
item.description: A look at shifting dating dynamics as more men refuse to stay in the friendzone and how some women are reacting.

media:content.media:description: A look at shifting dating dynamics as more men refuse to stay in the friendzone and how some women are reacting.

item.title: She doesn’t get why men don’t want to be EXPECTED to help
item.description: A conversation about why some men resist feeling obligated to help and prefer appreciation over expectation.

media:content.media:description: A conversation about why some men resist feeling obligated to help and prefer appreciation over expectation.
